commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `/new` and `/reset` matching case-insensitive in reset handling and startup-action selection, then updates focused reset-command tests for uppercase and mixed-case inputs.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +4. Total +5 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Partially: direct unnormalized handler inputs are source-reproducible against current main, but I did not establish a high-confidence live channel reproduction because the ordinary command context already canonicalizes registered aliases.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait for contributor-supplied real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair task for automation to perform.

target.title: fix: match session reset commands case-insensitively
target.body:
Summary
- Cherry-pick the internal `/NEW` and `/RESET` case-insensitive command matching fix onto current upstream.
- Resolve the upstream file split by applying the same behavior through `commands-reset.ts`, `get-reply.ts`, and `get-reply-run.ts`.
- Add regression coverage for `/NEW`, `/RESET`, and `/Reset <reason>`.

Provenance
- Internal source commit: `9ab04d9942` (`fix: make /NEW /RESET command matching case-insensitive`, author zhangtong26).
- Follow-up on this PR branch: `1d67e468ed` adds current upstream tests for uppercase and mixed-case reset commands.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-reset-mode.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-reset-hooks.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`

Behavior addressed: uppercase and mixed-case `/new` and `/reset` commands are handled as commands instead of falling through as normal user text.
Real environment tested: local upstream/main-based worktree under `.claude/worktrees/fix-session-command-case-insensitive`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-reset-mode.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-reset-hooks.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main`.
Evidence after fix: tests cover uppercase reset/new hooks and mixed-case reset with a reason tail; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Vitest passed with 2 test files and 14 tests; diff whitespace check was clean; autoreview clean.
What was not tested: no live channel command roundtrip was performed.
target.author: lanzhi-lee
